summary: Solid workflow and PowerShell implementation with good modularity and error handling. Workflow correctly uses `shell: pwsh`, pinned action refs, least-privilege permissions, and proper job sequencing. PowerShell code applies StrictMode and proper parameter validation. Issues: (1) Run-ActHarness.ps1 line 44–45 copies .actrc without existence check; (2) Harness line 67 regex pattern 'Summary . approved:' uses literal dot matching any char—fragile if formatting changes, should be 'Summary.*approved:'; (3) LicenseChecker.ps1 defines Invoke-LicenseCheckCli (unused in workflow)—violations of DRY; (4) Workflow assumes fixtures/ exist but not committed to repo—creates maintenance confusion despite harness setup mitigating it locally.
